---
name: Feature Request
about: Got an idea? We're listening. No promises, but we're listening.
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

> Describe the problem. Not "I want X" — why does X need to exist?
> Good answer: "Every time I try to Y, I have to Z which takes forever."
> Bad answer: "It would be cool if..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

> What should it do? How should it work? If you've already thought about the edge cases, we'll be genuinely impressed.

## Alternatives you've considered

> Did you try working around it? What else could solve this?

## Anything else?

> Mockups, examples from other tools, or a very passionate paragraph — all accepted.

> Note: features that require rewriting half the codebase will be met with polite enthusiasm and then quietly shelved.
